mapper.sql: spiti.id, spiti.group_id, spiti.employee_id, spiti.tax_period_start, spiti.tax_period_end, spiti.current_basic_pension_insurance, spiti.current_basic_medical, spiti.current_unemployment, spiti.current_housing_accumulation_fund, spiti.work_card, spiti.employee_name, spiti.month_income, spiti.amount_income, spiti.amount_deduct_expenses, spiti.amount_taxable_income, spiti.tax_rate, spiti.quick_calculation_deduction, spiti.amount_tax_due, spiti.amount_tax_paid, spiti.amount_tax_refund, spiti.operation_code, spiti.error_msg, spiti.data_status, spiti.create_time, spiti.create_by, spiti.update_time, spiti.update_by, spiti.deduct_sum_child_education, spiti.deduct_sum_education_continue, spiti.deduct_sum_house_loan, spiti.deduct_sum_housing_rental, spiti.deduct_sum_support_elderly, spiti.deduct_sum_three_child, spiti.income_period, spiti.tax_period

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.tax_period_start as ${tAlias}_tax_period_start, ${tAlias}.tax_period_end as ${tAlias}_tax_period_end, ${tAlias}.current_basic_pension_insurance as ${tAlias}_current_basic_pension_insurance, ${tAlias}.current_basic_medical as ${tAlias}_current_basic_medical, ${tAlias}.current_unemployment as ${tAlias}_current_unemployment, ${tAlias}.current_housing_accumulation_fund as ${tAlias}_current_housing_accumulation_fund, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.employee_name as ${tAlias}_employee_name, ${tAlias}.month_income as ${tAlias}_month_income, ${tAlias}.amount_income as ${tAlias}_amount_income, ${tAlias}.amount_tax_refund as ${tAlias}_amount_tax_refund, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.deduct_sum_child_education as ${tAlias}_deduct_sum_child_education, ${tAlias}.deduct_sum_education_continue as ${tAlias}_deduct_sum_education_continue, ${tAlias}.deduct_sum_house_loan as ${tAlias}_deduct_sum_house_loan, ${tAlias}.deduct_sum_housing_rental as ${tAlias}_deduct_sum_housing_rental, ${tAlias}.deduct_sum_support_elderly as ${tAlias}_deduct_sum_support_elderly, ${tAlias}.deduct_sum_three_child as ${tAlias}_deduct_sum_three_child, ${tAlias}.income_period as ${tAlias}_income_period, ${tAlias}.tax_period as ${tAlias}_tax_period
mapper.insert:
insert into swm_personal_income_tax_interface (group_id, employee_id, tax_period_start, tax_period_end, current_basic_pension_insurance, current_basic_medical, current_unemployment, current_housing_accumulation_fund, work_card, employee_name, month_income, amount_income, amount_deduct_expenses, amount_taxable_income, tax_rate, quick_calculation_deduction, amount_tax_due, amount_tax_paid, amount_tax_refund, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, deduct_sum_child_education, deduct_sum_education_continue, deduct_sum_house_loan, deduct_sum_housing_rental, deduct_sum_support_elderly, deduct_sum_three_child, income_period, tax_period ) values (#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{taxPeriodStart,jdbcType=DATE}, #{taxPeriodEnd,jdbcType=DATE}, #{currentBasicPensionInsurance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{currentBasicMedical,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{currentUnemployment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{currentHousingAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{monthIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountDeductExpenses,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTaxableIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{quickCalculationDeduction,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTaxDue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTaxPaid,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTaxRefund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deductSumChildEducation,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductSumEducationContinue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductSumHouseLoan,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductSumHousingRental,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductSumSupportElderly,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductSumThreeChild, jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{taxPeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
)
mapper.update:
update swm_personal_income_tax_interface set group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tax_period_start = #{taxPeriodStart,jdbcType=DATE}, tax_period_end = #{taxPeriodEnd,jdbcType=DATE}, current_basic_pension_insurance = #{currentBasicPensionInsurance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, current_basic_medical = #{currentBasicMedical,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, current_unemployment = #{currentUnemployment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, current_housing_accumulation_fund = #{currentHousingAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, month_income = #{monthIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_income = #{amountIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_deduct_expenses = #{amountDeductExpenses,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_taxable_income = #{amountTaxableIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, tax_rate = #{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, quick_calculation_deduction = #{quickCalculationDeduction,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_tax_due = #{amountTaxDue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_tax_paid = #{amountTaxPaid,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_tax_refund = #{amountTaxRefund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, deduct_sum_child_education = #{deductSumChildEducation,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduct_sum_education_continue = #{deductSumEducationContinue,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
deduct_sum_house_loan = #{deductSumHouseLoan,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduct_sum_housing_rental = #{deductSumHousingRental,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduct_sum_support_elderly = #{deductSumSupportElderly,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduct_sum_three_child = #{deductSumThreeChild,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, tax_period = #{taxPeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into swm_personal_income_tax_interface (group_id, employee_id,month_income,amount_income, work_card, employee_name,amount_taxable_income,tax_rate,quick_calculation_deduction,amount_tax_due, amount_tax_refund, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by,income_period,tax_period, amount_flag)
select #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, ISNULL((SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND se.work_flag = 1 ),-1), #{monthIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{amountIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{amountTaxableIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{quickCalculationDeduction,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTaxDue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTaxRefund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, 'C', CASE WHEN ( SELECT ISNULL( ( SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND se.work_flag = 1 ),- 1 ) ) = - 1 THEN '工号匹配失败' ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN ( SELECT ISNULL( ( SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND se.work_flag = 1 ),- 1 ) ) = - 1 THEN 'F' ELSE 'T' END,getdate(), #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, getdate(), #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{taxPeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, 0

insert into swm_personal_income_tax_interface (group_id, employee_id, tax_period_start, tax_period_end, current_basic_pension_insurance, current_basic_medical, current_unemployment, current_housing_accumulation_fund, work_card, employee_name, month_income, amount_income, amount_deduct_expenses, amount_taxable_income, tax_rate, quick_calculation_deduction, amount_tax_due, amount_tax_paid, amount_tax_refund, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, deduct_sum_child_education,deduct_sum_education_continue, deduct_sum_house_loan,deduct_sum_housing_rental, deduct_sum_support_elderly, deduct_sum_three_child, income_period, tax_period, amount_flag ) select #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, ISNULL( (SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND se.work_flag = 1 ),-1), #{taxPeriodStart,jdbcType=DATE}, #{taxPeriodEnd,jdbcType=DATE}, #{currentBasicPensionInsurance,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{currentBasicMedical,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{currentUnemployment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{currentHousingAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{monthIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{amountIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{amountDeductExpenses,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTaxableIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{quickCalculationDeduction,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTaxDue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTaxPaid,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTaxRefund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, 'C', CASE WHEN ( SELECT ISNULL( ( SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND se.work_flag = 1 ),- 1 ) ) = - 1 THEN '工号匹配失败' ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN ( SELECT ISNULL( ( SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND se.work_flag = 1 ),- 1 ) ) = - 1 THEN 'F' ELSE 'T' END, getdate(), #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, getdate(), #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{deductSumChildEducation,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductSumEducationContinue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductSumHouseLoan,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductSumHousingRental,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductSumSupportElderly,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductSumThreeChild,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{taxPeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, 1
